sentences.arabic: الْخَيَّاطُ التَّقْلِيدِيُّ يَخِيطُ الْمَلَابِسَ الْعَرَبِيَّةَ الْكَلَاسِيكِيَّةَ بِيَدِهِ بِمَهَارَةٍ عَالِيَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Tradicionalni krojač šiva klasičnu arapsku odjeću rukom s velikom vještinom.
sentences.translationEn: The traditional tailor sews classic Arab garments by hand with great skill.

sentences.arabic: يَأْتِيهِ الزَّبَائِنُ بِالْقُمَاشِ وَيَطْلُبُونَ مِنْهُ تَفْصِيلَ الثَّوْبِ أَوِ الْجَلَّابِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Mušterije mu donose tkaninu i traže da im sašije ogrtač ili džalabu.
sentences.translationEn: Customers bring him fabric and ask him to cut and sew a thobe or djellaba.

sentences.arabic: يُزَيِّنُ الْخَيَّاطُ الثِّيَابَ بِتَطْرِيزَاتٍ جَمِيلَةٍ بِالْخَيُوطِ الذَّهَبِيَّةِ وَالْفِضِّيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Krojač ukrašava odjeću lijepim vezom zlatnim i srebrnim nitima.
sentences.translationEn: The tailor decorates the garments with beautiful embroidery using gold and silver threads.

sentences.arabic: تُرْتَدَى هَذِهِ الثِّيَابُ الْمُطَرَّزَةُ فِي الْأَعْرَاسِ وَالْأَعْيَادِ وَالْمُنَاسَبَاتِ الْكَبِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovakva vezena odjeća nosi se na svadbama, praznicima i velikim svečanostima.
sentences.translationEn: These embroidered garments are worn at weddings, holidays, and important occasions.
